rationale.R1.1: Identifies the problem but does not provide a formal mathematical representation.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies inconsistencies in the problem formulation and suggests improvements for logical consistency.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (unified evaluation framework) and articulates the delta.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.

rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (lack of formalism and unsupported claims).
